sections.paragraph:
- Original: πυρόω

- Transliteration: Puroo

- Phonetic: poo-ro'-o

- Definition:

1. to burn with fire, to set on fire, kindle

a. to be on fire, to burn

1. to be incensed, indignant

b. make to glow

1. full of fire, fiery, ignited 1b

c. of darts filled with inflammable substances and set on fire

1. melted by fire and purged of dross

- Origin: from G4442

- TDNT entry: 21:49,0

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4442; to kindle that is (passively) to be ignited glow (literally) be refined (by implication) or (figuratively) to be inflamed (with anger grief lust): - burn fiery be on fire try.
